fields.name: To Send or Confirm
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of documents to send or confirm that are displayed in the Purchase Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Upcoming Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of upcoming orders that are displayed in the Purchase Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Outstanding Purchase Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of outstanding purchase orders that are displayed in the Purchase Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Purchase Return Orders - All
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of purchase return orders that are displayed in the Purchase Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Not Invoiced
fields.tooltip: Specifies received orders that are not invoiced. The orders are displayed in the Purchase Cue on the Purchasing Agent role center, and filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Partially Invoiced
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of partially invoiced orders that are displayed in the Purchase Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.
